mncSumArea.Description: Gets and displays the number and sum of areas of selected polylines, circles, arcs, splines and hatches
mncSumArea.h6: Insert the result as a single-line text
mncSumArea.h7: Insert the result into a table cell
mncSumArea.msg1: This hatch is not supported for area calculation. The boundaries forming the hatch intersect, overlap, or duplicate each other
mncSumArea.msg2: This hatch is not supported for area calculation. The boundaries forming the hatch contain an open polyline
